requirements.text: REST API section with all endpoints, methods, params, and response schemas
requirements.acceptance: Each endpoint has method, path, params, and example response

requirements.text: WebSocket section with connection URL, message format, and reconnection notes
requirements.acceptance: Message envelope format documented with JSON example

requirements.text: Prometheus section with metric names, types, labels, and scraping config
requirements.acceptance: All 9 metrics listed with name, type, and label dimensions

requirements.text: Configuration section with TOML, env vars, and ctx override docs
requirements.acceptance: All 7 config fields documented with type, default, env var, and TOML key
Clear ordering: defaults < TOML < env < ctx

requirements.text: Quick-start examples for enabling API, Prometheus, and config
requirements.acceptance: Copy-paste TOML snippet and env var examples

success_criteria: README documents all 7 REST endpoints with methods, paths, and response schemas
README documents WebSocket /ws/tps endpoint with message format
README documents all 7 config fields with env var names
